title: Chail Sanctuary
tagline: Chail Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: Chail Sanctuary is located at Chail, a hill station which is home to sambar, goral and cheer pheasants at Blossom and Jhaja.
overview.description: Chail Sanctuary is located at Chail, a hill station which is home to sambar, goral and cheer pheasants at Blossom and Jhaja. Barking deer and kalij pheasants are seen during dusk and dawn. The best time to visit is from March to October. Covering 110 km2, Chail Sanctuary has a vast forest cover.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chail, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Chail is a hill station in Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is 45 kilometres (28 mi) from Solan city and 44 kilometres (27 mi) from the state capital Shimla.

topPlaces.name: Kanwar Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: The Kanwar Sanctuary is located in Parbati valley of Kullu district. R.O. wildlife Kasol provides information and help to visitors.

topPlaces.name: Mahog
topPlaces.description: Mahog is a tiny village in the Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It has a population of around 50.

topPlaces.name: Sadhupul
topPlaces.description: Sadhupul is a small village in (dhalta) Himachal Pradesh between Solan and Chail, located at the site of a small bridge constructed over the hill river "Ashwini". On 23 August 2014 this bridge collapsed, when an overloaded truck tried to cross it.

topPlaces.name: Mohan Shakti National Heritage Park
topPlaces.description: Mohan Shakti National Heritage Park, also referred to as the Solan Heritage Park, is a modern-era Indian heritage complex in Harat, near Solan, Himachal Pradesh, India. It is about 40 kilometers south of Shimla, about 15 kilometers north of Solan, and 85 kilometers northeast of Chandigarh.

topPlaces.name: Junga, Himachal Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Junga is a tehsil in the Shimla district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Its original name (with diacritics) is Jūnga.

topPlaces.name: Mahi, Prayagraj
topPlaces.description: Mahi is a village in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Kandaghat
topPlaces.description: Kandaghat is a small town and tehsil (sub-district), near Solan city in the Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is on the Kalka-Shimla National Highway No.

items.note: Chail is a hill station in Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is 45 kilometres (28 mi) from Solan city and 44 kilometres (27 mi) from the state capital Shimla.
The Kanwar Sanctuary is located in Parbati valley of Kullu district. R.O. wildlife Kasol provides information and help to visitors.
Mahog is a tiny village in the Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It has a population of around 50.

Sadhupul is a small village in (dhalta) Himachal Pradesh between Solan and Chail, located at the site of a small bridge constructed over the hill river "Ashwini". On 23 August 2014 this bridge collapsed, when an overloaded truck tried to cross it.

Mohan Shakti National Heritage Park, also referred to as the Solan Heritage Park, is a modern-era Indian heritage complex in Harat, near Solan, Himachal Pradesh, India. It is about 40 kilometers south of Shimla, about 15 kilometers north of Solan, and 85 kilometers northeast of Chandigarh.
Junga is a tehsil in the Shimla district of Himachal Pradesh, India. Its original name (with diacritics) is Jūnga.
Mahi is a village in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India.
Kandaghat is a small town and tehsil (sub-district), near Solan city in the Solan district of Himachal Pradesh, India. It is on the Kalka-Shimla National Highway No.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chail Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chail Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chail Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shimla Airport (Jubbarhatti) (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chail Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chail Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chail Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chail Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chail Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chail, Himachal Pradesh, Kanwar Sanctuary, Mahog, Sadhupul, Mohan Shakti National Heritage Park.
